They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Dickinsons Real Deal
programme.desc: David Dickinson and antiques experts Ian Towning, Mike Melody and Tim Hogarth visit Todmorden, West Yorkshire, to offer locals the chance to put items up for auction or accept a cash sum. Among the days highlights is Tims deal on a pewter mirror

programme.title: Dickinsons Real Deal
programme.desc: David Dickinson and antiques dealers Ian Towning, Brenda Haller and David Hakeney visit Ulverston near the Lake District, where a rocking horse is sold at auction to raise money for a local hospice

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Roofer Simon is in a critical condition after falling off a two-storey building onto concrete. Major trauma consultant Rory and the team try to assess Simons multiple major injuries and work together to try to save his life. Ninety-seven-year-old Doris is in Resus with a worryingly fast and irregular heart rate, while in the Childrens Emergency department, 20-month-old Evelyn has a burn on her finger from a mozzarella stick

programme.title: Millionaire Hoarders
programme.desc: Car fanatic John decides to part with some of his beloved collection to help fund his retirement. Expert and fellow petrol-head Clive spots two classic cars in Johns collection that could raise a huge sum, but will his gamble on an auction sale pay off? In the West Country, Rachel and Ronnie help Caroline, who inherited an inn from her father but has made the difficult decision to part with some of its weird and wonderful contents in order to invest on the building. Ronnie spots a rare animal pelt that could be the solution to Carolines problems - if he can prove its authentic

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. The eaterys decline began when one of the pair started embezzling money to fund his prescription drug addiction, and things only got worse when the he was sentenced to four years in prison. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brothers trust before he can save their business

programme.title: Molly vs the Machines
programme.desc: Documentary about the death of Molly Russell, the 14-year-old who in 2017 took her own life as a result of depression and negative social media content, and her father Ians fight for online safety. The film focuses on what happened to Molly in the lead-up to her tragic death and the broader economic logic behind AI and big tech as it continues to shape, influence and infiltrate peoples lives

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to the Isle of Wight, where they meet Helen and husband Dave to restore unwanted items including a metal garden bench and an old water feature

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Gloucestershire, married couple Paul and Debbie kick off the competition with a menu of tried and tested dinner party favourites. However, engaged couple Angela and John arent impressed by their simple fare and posh couple Kirsty and James find Pauls behaviour even less palatable. Perfectionists Angela and John cook up dishes inspired by their favourite restaurant meals. Finally, Kirsty and James plan an organic, locally sourced menu. At the table theres a lesson in asparagus eating and the hosts get a dose of their own medicine when their guests return their food criticism

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: Siobhán McSweeney and judges Keith Brymer Jones and Rich Miller present the final, where the three remaining potters create miniature model theatres and take on a tricky throwing technique in their last surprise second challenge. Whose final curtain call will crown them as champion?

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Colin Jackson joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sams regulars are enticed away to a new neon-lit bar that comes complete with free food and dancing girls. Woodys marriage seems to be in trouble, and Carla looks for another job. American bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norms boozing expertise secures him his dream job as chief beer-taster at a brewery, while Rebecca grows addicted to the bars new slot machine. George Wendt stars alongside Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sams reputation is tested by Henris challenge to decide who is the more accomplished ladies man, and the battle to collect the most telephone numbers turns into an international contest between America and France

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Live coverage of the opening events on day seven of the Games in Italy, including the start of the mens giant slalom at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre, which will see ParalympicsGBs Neil Simpson go for a medal after winning bronze in this event at the 2023 Lleida World Championships

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Further live coverage of day seven of the Games in Italy. Dame Sarah Storey presents from Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium, where the semi-finals of the mixed team event takes place. Elsewhere, Alice Tai reports on the para biathlon at Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium, where ParalympicsGBs Scott Meenagh will hope to medal in the sprint pursuit in his third and final Paralympics

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Continued live coverage of day seven of the Games in Italy, including the conclusion of the para biathlon sprint pursuit at Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium. Plus, 16-year-old Dom Allen from Fife makes his ParalympicsGB debut in the mens standing alpine skiing giant slalom at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: David Coulthard is joined by Ariana Bravo to present action from the battle for Sprint Race positions in round two at Shanghai International Circuit

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts Laura and Nick dream of making a permanent move to Spain with their beloved dog Poppy. Theyre after a property in Estepona on Spains Costa del Sol that meets both their needs and Poppys. Property expert Jean Johansson lines up five options for their £160,000 budget

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Colin Jackson joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In Italy, holiday host Donna tries to keep up as reservations fly in at the height of the season. In France, BandB owners Paul and Melissa have to adapt their accommodation, while Brian and Paula fear that unseasonable weather will put a dampener on their new restaurants big summer event

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On payment day, a number of BandBers are sure that their competitors have been doing some tit-for-tat marking. When the dust settles, wholl win the week?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in Manchester, professional crooner Danny takes to the kitchen. As the guests travel from Spain to Thailand through the menu, Amys palette is tested with the Asian flavours. Will Dannys night be a success, or nothing to write home about? And who will win the £1,000 prize?

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Highlights
programme.desc: Ade Adepitan presents action from day seven of the Games, held in Milan and Cortina dAmpezzo, Italy. Neil Simpson and Scott Meenagh were looking for medals in the mens giant slalom at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre and the sprint pursuit at Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium respectively. Plus, the semi-finals of the mixed team wheelchair curling took place at Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium. With reports from Sarah Storey and Alica Tai

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Political Slot
programme.desc: Helen Whately MP, Shadow Secretary of State for Work and Pensions, sets out the Conservative Partys plan to get more people into work

programme.title: Inside the Worlds Most Luxurious Cruises
programme.desc: Behind-the-scenes on board some of the worlds most luxurious cruise ships, featuring a floating art gallery boasting a multi-million-pound collection and how pets are as pampered as their owners on board the Queen Mary 2. A passenger on his first-ever clipper voyage faces his fear of heights to fulfil a childhood dream as he climbs the mast of a tall ship

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on The Capture, Married at First Sight Australia, Louis Theroux: Inside the Manosphere, The Floor, Will and Ralf Should Know Better, Britains Best Mattress: How to Sleep Better and This Morning (AI boyfriend)

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by Richard Ayoade and Michelle Wolf for a comic review of the significant moments of the past seven days. As usual, the hashtag #isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: Greg Davies: The Back of My Mums Head
programme.desc: Stand-up comedy with the Man Down star, recorded at the Lowry in Salford. Stung by his mothers suggestion that he is not normal, Greg puts everyone else under the microscope in a petty quest to discover if anyone actually is. The tour received rave reviews and was extended to 94 dates, including multiple sell-out nights at Londons Hammersmith Apollo and Southbank Centre

programme.title: Bill Baileys Remarkable Guide to the Orchestra
programme.desc: The comedian joins forces with Oscar-winning composer Anne Dudley to investigate some of the finer nuances of orchestral performance. He teams up with the BBC Concert Orchestra to reveal the lesser-known influences of some of the worlds most celebrated composers, and exhibits some of his own original works

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Bridgeport, Connecticut, to visit Cafe Tavolini, which is being neglected by husband and wife managers teetering on the edge of divorce. The estranged couples two children are struggling to save the business from their parents disputes, and the visiting chef tries to shock the pair into stopping the restaurant from becoming a casualty of their quarrel

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Another selection of BandB owners take it in turns as hosts to decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money. The contest begins at Dunsandles Guest House in New Brighton, Merseyside, where owner Alan Johnson and his professional sidekick Dave Owen hope to win the title - but a scandal with some unwanted hair on the bed sheets is not a good start, and two guests feel they are making an exhibition of themselves with a tea-trolley in full view of the neighbours

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On the second day of the competition, the contestants visit the Lady Teal Hotel Boat on the waterways near Burnley in Lancashire, and owners Nick and Gina Mead hope to impress them with an afternoon of entertainment out on the locks. At breakfast, one of the guests admits to not enjoying his stay

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: From York House in Tetbury, Gloucestershire, where Brock Bergius hopes that his cheeky sense of humour and perfectionist nature will help him win the competition. He is in his element making saucy jokes during an afternoon of sausage making, but his reluctance to stray from the menu at breakfast leaves some of his guests disappointed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to Heyford House in Oxfordshire, where Leo and Sonya Brooke-Little hope to impress the contestants with their hospitality. The afternoon event is boxing, which Brock Burgius sees as the perfect opportunity to settle some scores with his fellow competitors

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The weeks winner is announced as the BandB owners meet for the last time to thrash out their differences. Feedback includes criticism of a badly positioned tea tray, controversy over a hot chocolate and accusations of overenthusiastic hosting

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: With Capel Salem slowly becoming a home, the next room for transformation is the Victorian-inspired parlour bathroom. Keith and Marj take inspiration from Coventry Cathedral, with Keith making a giant clay candlestick holder, while Marj sets about making her dream lampshade for the bathrooms standard lamp

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Market trader Russell and retired nurse Nicola kick-off proceedings in Essex and the evening seems to go well with one diner polishing off his own food - and everyone elses. The second night sees proud parents Sophie and Elliot host, but their guests find crab claws in their starter. On the third evening romantic duo Gemma and Glen decide to go for a more refined dining experience in the hope of winning the cash prize of £1,000. However, its Gemmas love for burlesque that grabs most attention

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie meet their neighbours after their backyards are destroyed by a hurricane. Carrie disapproves of their idea of combining the gardens when they rebuild - until the couple next door build a pool. Comedy, starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Cousin Danny loses his job, so Doug comes under pressure from Uncle Stu to find him a new one at IPS - a situation he is keen to avoid. Meanwhile, Arthur takes part in a test audience for a new film. Comedy, starring Kevin James, Gary Valentine and Jerry Stiller

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Incredible Lightness of Being a Baby
programme.desc: Cletus becomes a helium tycoon. Meanwhile, Marge reunites with baby Hudson

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart accidentally sees a new superhero film before its release, and realises he can use his plot-spoiling powers for his own ends. However, two movie executives will stop at nothing to keep his knowledge secret

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Ed Jackson and Billy Monger present coverage of the opening events of day eight of the Games from Milan and Cortina dAmpezzo, Italy. 2018 gold medallist Menna Fitzpatrick is expected to be among the leading contenders for this years title in the womens vision impaired alpine skiing slalom at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre, while 18-year-old Hester Poole is expected to make her debut at the Games. Elsewhere, the mens and womens snowboard banked slalom gets under way at Cortina Para Snowboard Park, with 2022 bronze medal winner Ollie Hill expected to be in action

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Further coverage of day eight of the Games from Milan and Cortina dAmpezzo, Italy. The second run of the mens and womens snowboard banked slalom takes place at Cortina Para Snowboard Park, where the likes of James Barnes-Miller, Ollie Hall, Matt Hamilton, Dave Zyw, and Nina Sparks will represent ParalympicsGB. The second run of the womens vision impaired alpine skiing slalom also takes place at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre, as do the para cross-country skiing finals at Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: The concluding live coverage of day eight of the Games from Milan and Cortina dAmpezzo, Italy. The mens and womens snowboard banked slalom finals, and womens vision impaired alpine skiing slalom final, are scheduled to come to their conclusions, before attention turns toward the Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium for the gold medal match in the mixed team wheelchair curling competition. China were victorious four years ago at the Games in Beijing following their 8-3 victory over Sweden, while Canada claimed the bronze medal after beating Slovakia by the same score

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.sub-title: 2026 Chinese Grand Prix Sprint Race And Qualifying
programme.desc: Lee McKenzie is joined by David Coulthard, Damon Hill, and Ariana Bravo to present action from the opening sprint race of the campaign and the battle for grid positions for the second round of the season at Shanghai International Circuit. Ferraris Lewis Hamilton won the sprint race here last year with Oscar Piastri of McLaren in second. Piastri then went one better in qualifying by claiming pole position on the starting grid, with Mercedes George Russell joining him on the front row

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Retired couple Dabi and Devi cant wait to wave goodbye to the grey skies of Croydon and say hola to the sunshine and heat in the seaside town of Gandia in Valencia. Theyre looking for a second home where they can spend up to six months at a time. With a budget of £180,000, Lee Juggurnauth lines up five impressive options, but will any wow Dabi and Devi enough to make the move?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer catches up with househunters who were keen to fly the nest. In 2017, Chloe was looking to move out of her parental home and find her own slice of Reading. But Chloes dad, who was helping with funds, had his own idea of what kind of place his daughter should buy, which didnt align with her own thoughts. In 2019, Ella and Grant were looking for their own place to start their lives together. But as Phil soon realised, Grant seemed nervous about moving out of his mums house

programme.title: George Clarkes Amazing Spaces
programme.sub-title: Camping Pod and a Straw Bale House
programme.desc: A man embarks on an incredible adventure as he converts a freefall lifeboat into a yellow submarine camping pod in honour of his late father, while three daughters and their mother create a straw bale house oozing with rustic charm. George continues his world tour of the UK as he experiences an oriental delight on the Isle of Wight. Together with master craftsman Will Hardie, the host makes an ingenious hidden rock pool for their magical secret garden home

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Highlights
programme.desc: Ade Adepitan presents action from day eight of the Games, held in Milan and Cortina dAmpezzo, Italy, where ParalympicsGB were expected to compete for medals in the mens and womens snowboard banked slalom finals, and the womens vision impaired alpine skiing slalom final. Other events taking centre stage included the para cross-country skiing finals, the gold medal match in the mixed team wheelchair curling, and the para ice hockey competition, which featured two classification finals

programme.title: The Race for Ancient Egypt in Colour
programme.desc: Part one of two. Documentary using colourised archive footage to explore archaeology in Egypt between the world wars, as the nation strove for sovereignty. The first episode begins in 1922, when Howard Carters discovery of the tomb of Tutankhamun transformed Egyptology into a global sensation and European and American institutions looked to unearth, and control, Egypts ancient heritage. A tense stand-off between Carter and Egypts new government begins, as the authorities seeks a greater say in how their nations ancient past is managed

programme.title: The Roman Empire by Train with Alice Roberts
programme.desc: Alice arrives in Nimes after crossing the Alps by train. The image of a crocodile is everywhere, commemorating Emperor Augustuss victory over Mark Antony and Cleopatra at the Battle of Actium in 31BCE. In Narbonne, Alice revels in more extraordinary Roman artefacts. The train follows the same route as Romes Via Domitia, eventually leading Alice all the way to Spain

programme.title: Bill Baileys Vietnam
programme.desc: Bill heads to the mountainous region of Da Lat, a French-built hill station surrounded by pine forests, where he tries meditation with monks at the Truc Lam monastery, picks leaves at the Cau Dat tea plantation, and zooms through the verdant hills on a mountain-top zipline. With his head in the clouds and romance in the air, Bill oscillates between kitschy tourism and earnest moments with locals

programme.title: Stillwater (2021)
programme.desc: Unemployed Bill Baker travels from his home in Stillwater, Oklahoma to Marseille, France to visit his estranged daughter Allison, who was imprisoned five years earlier for a murder she claims she didnt commit. Confronted with an insurmountable language barrier, cross-cultural differences and maddening legal complexity, Baker decides to take matters into his own hands to exonerate his only child after failing to get Allisons case re-opened. Crime thriller, starring Matt Damon and Abigail Breslin

programme.title: Mothering Sunday (2021)
programme.desc: A maid living in post-First World War England secretly plans to meet with the man she loves while her employers are away, seizing a last chance to be together before he leaves to marry another woman. Romantic drama, starring Odessa Young, Josh OConnor, Colin Firth and Olivia Colman

programme.title: Handcuffed: Last Pair Standing
programme.desc: Theres fireworks ahead as some of the cuffed pairs grapple with being chained to their total opposite. Horse trainer and countryside campaigner Claire, whos 48, is a fierce advocate of hard work. Her handcuffed partner, 29-year-old city-loving model and content creator Bambi loves the easy life. Can Bambi keep up with Claires exhausting work schedule? In London, Green Party councillor Frank, whos 27, and housing lawyer Lin, whos 38, seem to be getting along famously. But Franks in for a shock that leaves him speechless

programme.title: Handcuffed: Last Pair Standing
programme.desc: Some of the pairs have had enough and called it quits. But not 70-year-old Yorkshireman Bob and 38-year-old London youth worker Chris. However, when the latter learns about a shocking incident from his partners past, he wonder whether he can continue. Meanwhile, eco-warrior and vegan campaigner Morag is shocked when the woman she is chained to, petrol-head and beauty salon owner Angie, reveals her views on climate change. Hosted by Jonathan Ross

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Single mother Jo Beck wants to move her family to Derby, despite her children being happily settled in Nottingham. Phil Spencer helps her decide if relocating is the right choice and searches for a suitable home. Also in Derby, Kirstie Allsopp offers advice to outdoor sports enthusiasts Liz and John Fairfield, who are looking for a property with a large garden, storage space for their sporting equipment and no noise from nearby roads

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a union representative at the power plant and immediately uses his new-found authority to save the companys free dental plan and avoid having to pay for Lisas new braces. Featuring the voice of Dr Joyce Brothers

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: So Its Come to This: A Simpsons Clip Show
programme.desc: Barts latest prank wrecks the house and lands Homer in hospital, where he and the family reminisce about all the other injuries and mishaps he has suffered in his eventful and disaster-filled life

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Part one of two. Carrie discovers she is expecting a baby. Deacon and Kelly make a move to reconcile, leaving Spence out on a limb, and Arthur asks Doug to build him a bathroom in the basement. Comedy, starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Part two of two. Doug takes on a second job as a chauffeur to supplement his income, pressured by the expense of the new baby and bathroom. Meanwhile, Deacon and Kelly are reconciled with each other - leaving Spence all alone. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge puts a screen-time limit on the rest of the family, but soon realises that she might be the one who is addicted

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart starts to bond with Ned, prompting a jealous Homer to decide to start mentoring Nelson in retaliation

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Ed Jackson and Billy Monger present coverage of the ninth and final day of the Games from Milan and Cortina dAmpezzo, Italy. The first run of the mens vision impaired alpine skiing slalom final takes place at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre, where ParalympicsGB stars Neil Simpson, Sam Cozens and Fred Warburton are expected to be in action. Attention will then turn to the Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium where a number of para cross-country skiing finals take place, including the mens 20km interval start sitting event, where Scott Meenagh is likely to bring his career to an end. Meenagh was a Scotland U18 international rugby player before losing his legs after stepping on an IED in Afghanistan at the age of 21, and went on to become the first Briton to win a medal in para biathlon, claiming silver in the 12.5km individual event at the 2023 World Para Nordic Skiing Championships. With reports from Alice Tai and Dame Sarah Storey

programme.title: Millionaire Hoarders
programme.desc: Car fanatic John decides to part with some of his beloved collection to help fund his retirement. Expert and fellow petrol-head Clive spots two classic cars in Johns collection that could raise a huge sum, but will his gamble on an auction sale pay off? In the West Country, Rachel and Ronnie help Caroline, who inherited an inn from her father but has made the difficult decision to part with some of its weird and wonderful contents in order to invest on the building. Ronnie spots a rare animal pelt that could be the solution to Carolines problems - if he can prove its authentic

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. The eaterys decline began when one of the pair started embezzling money to fund his prescription drug addiction, and things only got worse when the he was sentenced to four years in prison. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brothers trust before he can save their business

programme.title: Molly vs the Machines
programme.desc: Documentary about the death of Molly Russell, the 14-year-old who in 2017 took her own life as a result of depression and negative social media content, and her father Ians fight for online safety. The film focuses on what happened to Molly in the lead-up to her tragic death and the broader economic logic behind AI and big tech as it continues to shape, influence and infiltrate peoples lives

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to the Isle of Wight, where they meet Helen and husband Dave to restore unwanted items including a metal garden bench and an old water feature

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Gloucestershire, married couple Paul and Debbie kick off the competition with a menu of tried and tested dinner party favourites. However, engaged couple Angela and John arent impressed by their simple fare and posh couple Kirsty and James find Pauls behaviour even less palatable. Perfectionists Angela and John cook up dishes inspired by their favourite restaurant meals. Finally, Kirsty and James plan an organic, locally sourced menu. At the table theres a lesson in asparagus eating and the hosts get a dose of their own medicine when their guests return their food criticism

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: Siobhán McSweeney and judges Keith Brymer Jones and Rich Miller present the final, where the three remaining potters create miniature model theatres and take on a tricky throwing technique in their last surprise second challenge. Whose final curtain call will crown them as champion?

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Colin Jackson joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sams regulars are enticed away to a new neon-lit bar that comes complete with free food and dancing girls. Woodys marriage seems to be in trouble, and Carla looks for another job. American bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norms boozing expertise secures him his dream job as chief beer-taster at a brewery, while Rebecca grows addicted to the bars new slot machine. George Wendt stars alongside Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sams reputation is tested by Henris challenge to decide who is the more accomplished ladies man, and the battle to collect the most telephone numbers turns into an international contest between America and France

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Live coverage of the opening events on day seven of the Games in Italy, including the start of the mens giant slalom at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre, which will see ParalympicsGBs Neil Simpson go for a medal after winning bronze in this event at the 2023 Lleida World Championships

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Further live coverage of day seven of the Games in Italy. Dame Sarah Storey presents from Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium, where the semi-finals of the mixed team event takes place. Elsewhere, Alice Tai reports on the para biathlon at Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium, where ParalympicsGBs Scott Meenagh will hope to medal in the sprint pursuit in his third and final Paralympics

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Continued live coverage of day seven of the Games in Italy, including the conclusion of the para biathlon sprint pursuit at Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium. Plus, 16-year-old Dom Allen from Fife makes his ParalympicsGB debut in the mens standing alpine skiing giant slalom at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: David Coulthard is joined by Ariana Bravo to present action from the battle for Sprint Race positions in round two at Shanghai International Circuit

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts Laura and Nick dream of making a permanent move to Spain with their beloved dog Poppy. Theyre after a property in Estepona on Spains Costa del Sol that meets both their needs and Poppys. Property expert Jean Johansson lines up five options for their £160,000 budget

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Colin Jackson joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In Italy, holiday host Donna tries to keep up as reservations fly in at the height of the season. In France, BandB owners Paul and Melissa have to adapt their accommodation, while Brian and Paula fear that unseasonable weather will put a dampener on their new restaurants big summer event

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On payment day, a number of BandBers are sure that their competitors have been doing some tit-for-tat marking. When the dust settles, wholl win the week?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in Manchester, professional crooner Danny takes to the kitchen. As the guests travel from Spain to Thailand through the menu, Amys palette is tested with the Asian flavours. Will Dannys night be a success, or nothing to write home about? And who will win the £1,000 prize?

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Highlights
programme.desc: Ade Adepitan presents action from day seven of the Games, held in Milan and Cortina dAmpezzo, Italy. Neil Simpson and Scott Meenagh were looking for medals in the mens giant slalom at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre and the sprint pursuit at Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium respectively. Plus, the semi-finals of the mixed team wheelchair curling took place at Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium. With reports from Sarah Storey and Alica Tai

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Political Slot
programme.desc: Helen Whately MP, Shadow Secretary of State for Work and Pensions, sets out the Conservative Partys plan to get more people into work

programme.title: Inside the Worlds Most Luxurious Cruises
programme.desc: Behind-the-scenes on board some of the worlds most luxurious cruise ships, featuring a floating art gallery boasting a multi-million-pound collection and how pets are as pampered as their owners on board the Queen Mary 2. A passenger on his first-ever clipper voyage faces his fear of heights to fulfil a childhood dream as he climbs the mast of a tall ship

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the weeks biggest and best shows

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by Richard Ayoade and Michelle Wolf for a comic review of the significant moments of the past seven days. As usual, the hashtag #isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: Greg Davies: The Back of My Mums Head
programme.desc: Stand-up comedy with the Man Down star, recorded at the Lowry in Salford. Stung by his mothers suggestion that he is not normal, Greg puts everyone else under the microscope in a petty quest to discover if anyone actually is. The tour received rave reviews and was extended to 94 dates, including multiple sell-out nights at Londons Hammersmith Apollo and Southbank Centre

programme.title: Bill Baileys Remarkable Guide to the Orchestra
programme.desc: The comedian joins forces with Oscar-winning composer Anne Dudley to investigate some of the finer nuances of orchestral performance. He teams up with the BBC Concert Orchestra to reveal the lesser-known influences of some of the worlds most celebrated composers, and exhibits some of his own original works

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Bridgeport, Connecticut, to visit Cafe Tavolini, which is being neglected by husband and wife managers teetering on the edge of divorce. The estranged couples two children are struggling to save the business from their parents disputes, and the visiting chef tries to shock the pair into stopping the restaurant from becoming a casualty of their quarrel

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Another selection of BandB owners take it in turns as hosts to decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money. The contest begins at Dunsandles Guest House in New Brighton, Merseyside, where owner Alan Johnson and his professional sidekick Dave Owen hope to win the title - but a scandal with some unwanted hair on the bed sheets is not a good start, and two guests feel they are making an exhibition of themselves with a tea-trolley in full view of the neighbours

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On the second day of the competition, the contestants visit the Lady Teal Hotel Boat on the waterways near Burnley in Lancashire, and owners Nick and Gina Mead hope to impress them with an afternoon of entertainment out on the locks. At breakfast, one of the guests admits to not enjoying his stay

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: From York House in Tetbury, Gloucestershire, where Brock Bergius hopes that his cheeky sense of humour and perfectionist nature will help him win the competition. He is in his element making saucy jokes during an afternoon of sausage making, but his reluctance to stray from the menu at breakfast leaves some of his guests disappointed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to Heyford House in Oxfordshire, where Leo and Sonya Brooke-Little hope to impress the contestants with their hospitality. The afternoon event is boxing, which Brock Burgius sees as the perfect opportunity to settle some scores with his fellow competitors

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The weeks winner is announced as the BandB owners meet for the last time to thrash out their differences. Feedback includes criticism of a badly positioned tea tray, controversy over a hot chocolate and accusations of overenthusiastic hosting

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: With Capel Salem slowly becoming a home, the next room for transformation is the Victorian-inspired parlour bathroom. Keith and Marj take inspiration from Coventry Cathedral, with Keith making a giant clay candlestick holder, while Marj sets about making her dream lampshade for the bathrooms standard lamp

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Market trader Russell and retired nurse Nicola kick-off proceedings in Essex and the evening seems to go well with one diner polishing off his own food - and everyone elses. The second night sees proud parents Sophie and Elliot host, but their guests find crab claws in their starter. On the third evening romantic duo Gemma and Glen decide to go for a more refined dining experience in the hope of winning the cash prize of £1,000. However, its Gemmas love for burlesque that grabs most attention

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie meet their neighbours after their backyards are destroyed by a hurricane. Carrie disapproves of their idea of combining the gardens when they rebuild - until the couple next door build a pool. Comedy, starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Cousin Danny loses his job, so Doug comes under pressure from Uncle Stu to find him a new one at IPS - a situation he is keen to avoid. Meanwhile, Arthur takes part in a test audience for a new film. Comedy, starring Kevin James, Gary Valentine and Jerry Stiller

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Incredible Lightness of Being a Baby
programme.desc: Cletus becomes a helium tycoon. Meanwhile, Marge reunites with baby Hudson

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart accidentally sees a new superhero film before its release, and realises he can use his plot-spoiling powers for his own ends. However, two movie executives will stop at nothing to keep his knowledge secret

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Ed Jackson and Billy Monger present coverage of the opening events of day eight of the Games from Milan and Cortina dAmpezzo, Italy. 2018 gold medallist Menna Fitzpatrick is expected to be among the leading contenders for this years title in the womens vision impaired alpine skiing slalom at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre, while 18-year-old Hester Poole is expected to make her debut at the Games. Elsewhere, the mens and womens snowboard banked slalom gets under way at Cortina Para Snowboard Park, with 2022 bronze medal winner Ollie Hill expected to be in action

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Further coverage of day eight of the Games from Milan and Cortina dAmpezzo, Italy. The second run of the mens and womens snowboard banked slalom takes place at Cortina Para Snowboard Park, where the likes of James Barnes-Miller, Ollie Hall, Matt Hamilton, Dave Zyw, and Nina Sparks will represent ParalympicsGB. The second run of the womens vision impaired alpine skiing slalom also takes place at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre, as do the para cross-country skiing finals at Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: The concluding live coverage of day eight of the Games from Milan and Cortina dAmpezzo, Italy. The mens and womens snowboard banked slalom finals, and womens vision impaired alpine skiing slalom final, are scheduled to come to their conclusions, before attention turns toward the Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium for the gold medal match in the mixed team wheelchair curling competition. China were victorious four years ago at the Games in Beijing following their 8-3 victory over Sweden, while Canada claimed the bronze medal after beating Slovakia by the same score

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.sub-title: 2026 Chinese Grand Prix Sprint Race And Qualifying
programme.desc: Lee McKenzie is joined by David Coulthard, Damon Hill, and Ariana Bravo to present action from the opening sprint race of the campaign and the battle for grid positions for the second round of the season at Shanghai International Circuit. Ferraris Lewis Hamilton won the sprint race here last year with Oscar Piastri of McLaren in second. Piastri then went one better in qualifying by claiming pole position on the starting grid, with Mercedes George Russell joining him on the front row

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Retired couple Dabi and Devi cant wait to wave goodbye to the grey skies of Croydon and say hola to the sunshine and heat in the seaside town of Gandia in Valencia. Theyre looking for a second home where they can spend up to six months at a time. With a budget of £180,000, Lee Juggurnauth lines up five impressive options, but will any wow Dabi and Devi enough to make the move?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer catches up with househunters who were keen to fly the nest. In 2017, Chloe was looking to move out of her parental home and find her own slice of Reading. But Chloes dad, who was helping with funds, had his own idea of what kind of place his daughter should buy, which didnt align with her own thoughts. In 2019, Ella and Grant were looking for their own place to start their lives together. But as Phil soon realised, Grant seemed nervous about moving out of his mums house

programme.title: George Clarkes Amazing Spaces
programme.sub-title: Camping Pod and a Straw Bale House
programme.desc: A man embarks on an incredible adventure as he converts a freefall lifeboat into a yellow submarine camping pod in honour of his late father, while three daughters and their mother create a straw bale house oozing with rustic charm. George continues his world tour of the UK as he experiences an oriental delight on the Isle of Wight. Together with master craftsman Will Hardie, the host makes an ingenious hidden rock pool for their magical secret garden home

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Highlights
programme.desc: Ade Adepitan presents action from day eight of the Games, held in Milan and Cortina dAmpezzo, Italy, where ParalympicsGB were expected to compete for medals in the mens and womens snowboard banked slalom finals, and the womens vision impaired alpine skiing slalom final. Other events taking centre stage included the para cross-country skiing finals, the gold medal match in the mixed team wheelchair curling, and the para ice hockey competition, which featured two classification finals

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Concluding coverage of the ninth and final day of the Games from Milan and Cortina dAmpezzo, Italy. Elsewhere, the para ice hockey competition is brought to a conclusion with the bronze- and gold-medal matches at Milano Santagiulia Ice Hockey Arena, the latter of which is the final action of the Games. With reports from Alice Tai and Dame Sarah Storey

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA
programme.desc: Improv comedy show with Colin Mochrie, Ryan Stiles, Jeff Davis, Brad Sherwood and Aisha Tyler and a special appearance by Cheryl Hines

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA
programme.desc: Bill Nye The Science Guy guests on the comic improv show, with regulars Wayne Brady, Gary Proops, Colin Mochrie and Ryan Stiles

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA
programme.desc: Aisha Taylor hosts the comic improv show, with Wayne Brady, Keegan-Michael Key, Colin Mochrie and Ryan Stiles

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Jimmy hosts South Park Elementarys first comedy awards ceremony, where he insults the Germans by stating they are the least funny people in the world, prompting them to promise swift and brutal retribution against the school

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: In an episode inspired by the Duke and Duchess of Cambridges wedding, the Prince of Canada prepares to wed his fiancee in a lavish ceremony. However, when the bride is abducted during the event, Canadians all over the world are sent a call to arms, one that is accepted by Kyles little brother Ike

programme.title: MTV Cribs UK
programme.desc: Big Zuu and the lads cook up a storm in London, while internet icon Charity Shop Sue (Selina Mosinski) gives a tour of her Nottingham home

programme.title: Comedy Central Live
programme.desc: A stand-up special inw hich the comedian and actor shows off his self-defence moves, talks about how his mum ruins his game, and what he loves about American TV

programme.title: Kerry Godliman: Bandwidth
programme.desc: A stand-up show by the actress at Londons Comedy Store, covering a range of topics concerning middle-aged life, including wellness, influencers, robots and fashion

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rosss Inappropriate Song
programme.desc: Ross makes Emma laugh by singing Baby Got Back, while Joey and Chandler find an incriminating video in Richards old apartment with a familiar face in a leading role. Phoebe fails to impress her boyfriends parents, who encourage him to date someone else, forcing him to declare his love for her

programme.desc: Part two of two. As everyone makes their final preparations for Rosss wedding in London, Rachel tries to get a flight out to declare her love for him before he marries Emily. Guest starring Jennifer Saunders, Elliott Gould, Hugh Laurie and Tom Conti

programme.sub-title: The One After Ross Says Rachel
programme.desc: Despite Rosss massive blunder, he and Emily go through with the wedding - but she is clearly devastated and sneaks out of a window at the reception, declaring she never wants to see him again. Guest starring Helen Baxendale, Elliott Gould and Jennifer Saunders

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Kissing
programme.desc: Rachel returns from Greece and Chandler proves popular with the womenfolk. Phoebe feels upset about missing out on all the excitement in London, so the gang decides to treat her to a weekend in Atlantic City. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Surrogate mum Phoebe goes into labour and gives birth to triplets, but it proves harder than she anticipated to hand them over to her brother. Meanwhile, Joey experiences some pain of his own and Monica plans to spite Chandler by dating a male nurse

programme.title: Beethoven (1992)
programme.desc: An all-American family adopts a huge St Bernard, but the father is dismayed when it turns into a one-dog disaster zone. He insists the mutt must go to a new home, but when it is kidnapped by a crooked vet, dad has a change of heart and races to the rescue. Comedy, starring Charles Grodin, Bonnie Hunt, Oliver Platt and David Duchovny

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Phoebe Hates PBS
programme.desc: Emily makes a request that could change Rosss life for ever, presenting him with a huge dilemma. Chandler upsets Monica by gloating about sex, while Joey challenges Phoebe to perform a completely selfless act. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer, Matthew Perry and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross delivers devastating news to Rachel - he cannot spend time with her while Emily is in New York. Meanwhile, Joey discovers Chandlers secret romance. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Emily asks Ross to move away from his friends, while Monica and Rachel are understandably taken aback to meet a hairy man who they mistake for a yeti. American comedy, starring David Schwimmer and Helen Baxendale

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Moves In
programme.desc: Ross moves in with Chandler and Joey, but the transition does not go as smoothly as expected. Danny deals Rachels ego a blow by introducing her to an exceptionally dull date, and Phoebe becomes disillusioned with the health inspector she is seeing

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Thanksgivings
programme.desc: The pals digest a huge Thanksgiving meal and reminisce about their worst holiday experiences, including the time Chandlers father left his mother in favour of the houseboy, and the occasion in 1987 when a teenage Monica overheard Chandler calling her fat. Guest starring Morgan Fairchild

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey tries to cover up Chandler and Monicas relationship - but only succeeds in making himself look stupid. Phoebe persuades Rachel to take a literature class with her, while Ross falls out with his co-workers, convinced one of them stole his prized sandwich

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Inappropriate Sister
programme.desc: Ross struggles to come to terms with life as one of the unemployed, and turns to Joey for advice. Rachel is disturbed by her new boyfriends uncomfortably close relationship with his sister. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Resolutions
programme.desc: The pals announce resolutions for the coming year and Chandler enlists Joeys help so he can kiss Monica at midnight during a New Years Eve party. American comedy, starring Matthew Perry and Courtney Cox

programme.title: Bad Moms (2016)
programme.desc: Three overworked, exhausted and under-appreciated women are pushed beyond their breaking points, so decide to ditch their conventional responsibilities for a binge of long overdue freedom, fun and self-indulgence. Comedy, starring Mila Kunis, Kathryn Hahn, Kristen Bell and Jada Pinkett Smith

programme.title: Lee Evans: XL Tour
programme.desc: The comedians performance in Cardiff, part of his 35-date tour during which he entertained 4,500 fans with topics such as satellite navigation, hotel porters and romantic experiences in the bath

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: Gok Wan, Sarah Millican, Seann Walsh and Amy Childs join team captains Jon Richardson and Sean Lock on the irreverent panel show, hosted by Jimmy Carr. The contestants answer questions based on opinion polls carried out around the country to see who best understands what is going on in Britain today

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: Actress Patsy Kensit, comedienne Sarah Millican, comedian Chris Ramsey and survivalist Bear Grylls join team captains Jon Richardson and Sean Lock to poke fun at some hot topics. Extended edition of the irreverent panel show hosted by Jimmy Carr

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA
programme.desc: Actress Candice Patton joins in the fun on the comic improv show, with regulars Wayne Brady, Jeff Davis, Colin Mochrie and Ryan Stiles

programme.title: Jimmy Carrs Am I the A**hole?
programme.desc: GK Barry and Jamali Maddix pass judgement on a controversial psychic, someone who ended a friendship over ketchup, and some wild revenge against an ex

programme.title: Iain Stirlings Roast the Internet

programme.title: Chasing Classic Cars
programme.desc: A proud son wants to surprise his dad with a 1960 Chevy pickup truck for his 65th birthday. Elsewhere, Wayne buys a single-owner 67 Lamborghini 400 GT

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Single mum and occasional poet Frankie hits it off with primary school teacher Charlie, but will he still be interested when she reveals she has children? Olive and Terence are both in their eighties and havent given up on finding someone special. As they bond over memories of lost loves, tennis and amateur dramatics, Olive hopes Terence will ask her to the theatre. Divorcee Karen, 34, is pleased that Mitch seems to tick all the boxes, while 25-year-old Anita has drawn up a checklist in her search for a perfect match. Her blind date is international rugby player Max, who has never been in a relationship but wants to settle down

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.sub-title: Best Naughty Bits: The Good, the Bad and the Kinky
programme.desc: Another romp through the Naked Attraction archive, this time focusing on the people doing the choosing - from those that it seemed butter would not melt to the ones who revealed their darkest secrets. Highlights include the polyamorous couple picking a date to the time the bodies were covered in whipped cream, strawberries and custard

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Chris is forced to admit that Brook is ticking all of his boxes, Gia weighs up taking an intimate step with Scott after years of celibacy, while Alissa and David make the most of their mountain escape

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions to In With a Shout, Gordon Ramsays Future Food Stars, Rise and Fall, Saving Our Wild Isles, Last Woman on Earth with Sarah Pascoe, Obsession and Dr Down Below. First shown in April 2023

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica is jealous of Barrys outstanding performance when they both get after-school jobs at Spencers Gifts selling novelty presents at the shopping mall. Murray insists that Adam must get a job too, but Beverly thinks he should focus on his filmmaking instead

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam tries to develop an acting career, a talent agent decides hes only suitable for nerd roles, so Beverly makes it her mission to turn him into a teen heartthrob. Barry decides to embrace the punk rock lifestyle, and Murray attempts to get more involved in Ericas life

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Inspired by the Karate Kid films, Adam and the other Adam Goldberg decide to face off in a karate match to settle their long-running feud once and for all. Later, Barry and Adam ask Uncle Marvin for some martial arts training - but the only thing they learn is how to do his cleaning

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Jai and Leanne, best man Pells and father of the bride Bruce look back at their unforgettable sky high wedding in 2016

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch, Cam and Phil crash Jays annual hiking trip to find an elusive eagle after Gloria asks them to keep an eye on him, while Alex, Claire and Haley plan a baby shower

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil feels emasculated when Bill wows Dylan and Luke with heroic tales. He gets them over for some male bonding, but it goes rather wrong

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Los Angeles to help La Frite, an outdated French restaurant that is failing to make any profits. His first step is to try to reconcile the feuding family members who run the business, and so devises a plan to bring them together by using secret filming

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and his friends are recruited to the William Penn Academy baseball team. Barry remains in denial about his pitching skills, while Geoffs father interferes in his relationship with Erica

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Assisted by Geoff, Erica and Valley Erica find a new band member to replace Lainey, but Barry convinces Geoff that the new musician is trying to steal Erica from him. Adam and Murray each plot to get out of going to Valentines Day dinner with Beverly

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Alexs new company puts her up at a new luxury apartment with full amenities - and a list of high-profile residents that everyone is eager to take advantage of, without her knowing. Phil is on a mission to review the restaurants famous sliders for his food blog, while Mitch and Cam sneak in separately to meet David Beckham. Meanwhile, Luke and Manny head straight for the gym to try to pick up older women and end up in hot water. Guest starring Courtney Cox and Stephen Merchant

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil pays a visit to his dad to make sure he is okay after hearing some concerning news about him. Meanwhile, Jay gives Claire and Mitch some of their old childhood memorabilia, which prompts them to revaluate a long-held memory of their first family vacation

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Homer rent an apartment in an affluent area so their children can have a good education when Springfield Elementary is rated the worst school in the state. Bart wastes no time in establishing a bad-boy persona, and increases Lisas popularity by telling people she knows a pop star. With the voice of Elliot Page (Juno)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Four Great Women and a Manicure
programme.desc: Marge takes Lisa for her first manicure at the salon, where they debate whether a woman can be smart, beautiful and powerful all at the same time. Four tales featuring strong women from history and literature are retold with Selma appearing as Elizabeth I, Lisa as Snow White, Marge as Lady Macbeth and Maggie as Howard Roark from The Fountainhead

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: An outbreak of food poisoning at Krusty Burger is traced to barley produced in a nearby town of Norwegian immigrants and results in the mills being shut down, so the out-of-work residents venture to Springfield to find new jobs. However, when xenophobia starts to spread, Mayor Quimby decides to shut the borders

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Pasadena, California, where he visits Jamaican-themed restaurant Cafe Kingston. The business in run by Dr Una Morris, a micro-managing owner who also works at a radiotherapy clinic next door, and is determined to introduce hospital-style techniques to the kitchen by sealing everything in plastic bags

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Eagle Rock in California to try to change the fortunes of Capri, a grubby restaurant that often remains closed during lunchtime because of the twin owners lazy attitude. A crisis ensues as soon as Gordon instructs the duo to clean the place, revealing that only tough measures are likely to save the business

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer helps Ned build a Christian amusement park called Praiseland as a lasting monument to Maude Flanders. Unfortunately, it meets with an unenthusiastic response - until a seemingly genuine miracle occurs

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer, Marge and the kids hitch a ride on a train, where they are entertained by a tramp who tells them a series of colourful yarns based on American folklore - all of which feature characters suspiciously reminiscent of Homer

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Manny takes time out to play with Luke, before having a heart-to-heart with stepsister Claire. Gloria goes shopping for a dress with Alex, and Phil urges Jay to fly his new model aeroplane with him. Comedy, starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchells mother tries to make amends for the incident at Jay and Glorias wedding but no one is happy to see her, and the whole family has dinner at Claires house. American comedy, guest starring Shelley Long

programme.sub-title: Kill Gil, Volumes I and II

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family goes away to Marges favourite childhood holiday destination, which has unfortunately changed since she was last there. Homer spurs the locals into sprucing the place up, but an exuberant firework display wrecks everything, forcing him to make amends by becoming a fisherman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moe is faced with a difficult choice when Evergreen Terrace develops a traffic problem

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The latest run kicks off with stag and hen nights, as a fresh group of hopeful singles take their final steps toward marrying strangers

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The weddings erupt into chaos when Luke forgets the rings, leaving Mel struggling to move past a rocky start and setting an awkward tone for their reception

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The honeymoons highlight stark contrasts as Gia and Scott wake up smitten and excited for tropical Townsville, while Mel and Luke remain distant, heading to a cold and uncomfortable getaway

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Chris is forced to admit that Brook is ticking all of his boxes, Gia weighs up taking an intimate step with Scott after years of celibacy, while Alissa and David make the most of their mountain escape

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barrys membership of a friendship group is jeopardised and a family swear jar is introduced. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride: Revisited

programme.title: Modern Family

Elsewhere, Mitchell and Manny learn they have more in common than they thought during a trip to watch a meteor shower with Jay. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. The eaterys decline began when one of the pair started embezzling money to fund his prescription drug addiction, and things only got worse when the he was sentenced to four years in prison. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brothers trust before he can save their business

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to New Orleans to visit Zekes, a much-loved restaurant that has seen standards slip since the original owner died. The new proprietors, husband and wife duo Darryl and Ellen Cortello, focused all the efforts on the financial side of things, so it is up to Gordon to show them that they first need to love food to make any profit

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Boy Who Knew Too Much
programme.desc: Mayor Quimbys nephew is wrongly accused of assault, presenting Bart with a dilemma - if he volunteers the information that would clear the lads name, he risks being expelled from school for playing truant

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family celebrates Maggies birthday. Bart steals Homers wallet to pay for an Itchy and Scratchy souvenir, and Grandma Bouvier is swept off her feet by Grampa - but Mr Burns provides romantic competition, convinced she is the woman for him

programme.sub-title: The City of New York v Homer Simpson

Although Homer hates the Big Apple - owing to an unfortunate incident from his youth - the family heads to there to try to get the car back

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: As Principal Skinner prepares to enjoy a ceremony celebrating his 20th year as head of Springfield Elementary, a stranger exposes him as a former street punk who stole his identity. Featuring the guest voice of Martin Sheen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After making a mess of a speech at work, Homer tries to bolster his public speaking skills by turning to improvisational comedy. Marge decides to upgrade Barts tumbledown treehouse, but tensions arise when Bart questions her building skills

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge receives a jail sentence for child neglect after letting Bart go to the park unsupervised. While prison serves as a welcome break from her hectic home life, Homer struggles to hold the fort in her absence

programme.desc: Babatunde Aleshe, Mo Gilligan, Andi Oliver, Rylan, Chris Packham, Shaun Ryder, Bez, Jane McDonald, Sara Cox, Annie Mac, Stephen Mangan, Gyles Brandreth, Lulu, Judi Love, Charlene White, Clare Balding, Alice Arnold and Bobby and Jeff Brazier review shows including Love Island, Bake Off: The Professionals, The Supervet, MILF Manor, Under Paris, The Motorway Hotel and Countdown

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: North London charmer Ori gets to know primary school teacher and judo black belt Nadia, south London hairdresser Mula is left waiting for her date to turn up, and singer-songwriter Dan aims to impress English student Nathania. Geordie postie Jodie hopes her date with Laura will be first-class, while retired engineer Eric meets part-time actress Jan

programme.title: First Dates

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claires newfound positivity leads her to inadvertently approve of Lukes new relationship with someone from work, while Phil gets a shock when he surprises Alex at school

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Haley and Dylans plan to quietly elope before the babies are born doesnt go as smoothly as they had hoped. Meanwhile, Jay continues to try to get his new business off the ground by courting an Instagram celebrity

programme.title: My Spy (2020)
programme.desc: Special Forces operative turned spy JJ undertakes covert surveillance of Kate Newton, the sister-in-law of a terrorist. JJ is ordered to keep a low profile. Unfortunately, Kates resourceful nine-year-old daughter Sophie blows his cover and blackmails JJ into training her as a spy. Comedy, starring Dave Bautista and Chloe Coleman

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers
programme.desc: Visitors to the studio include chef Aggie, who needs assistance removing an offensive tattoo that covers her chest. Jay helps paramedic Anthony disguise his tattoo, which is putting the frighteners on his patients. Alice has to cover up Sonnys unwanted present from his mates, while Sketch deals with Alexs drunken DIY teddy bear design

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The competitors are lured to a wasteland for a challenge involving eggs and medical equipment. David Baddiel spray-paints his face and Jo Brand reveals her psychic superpowers. Presented by Greg Davies, with help from co-host Alex Horne

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel shows version of the words-and numbers-quiz, inviting Sean Lock and Katherine Ryan to take on Jon Richardson and Joe Wilkinson. John Cooper Clarke joins wordsmith Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while maths whizz Rachel Riley looks after the numbers

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Stephen J Cloobeck, chairman and CEO of hotel company Diamond Resorts International, becomes the first boss to go incognito at his own organisation for a second time. His mission is to rebuild a business that he has just purchased, Pacific Monarch Resorts, which has locations across the western US and Mexico. He disguises himself as an ex-construction worker who wants to open a boutique hotel, going the extra mile by having his ears pierced to complete the look

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Steve Greenbaum goes undercover among the workforce of his company PostNet, which offers design, printing and shipping services to small businesses. Posing as a failed motorcycle shop owner, he tries to find out how his staff are responding to firms that have been hit by the global recession

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Blackpool compete for the £1,000 prize, beginning with practising Buddhist Antonio and former Redcoat Jason, who serve up a sushi starter. A discovery on day two at the home of fireman Daz and his wife Kim raises a few eyebrows, while the final night sees foodies Martin and Kate prepare an authentic Thai menu and a chocolate dessert

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples compete for the £1,000 prize in Swindon, where Carla and Hayley kick off the competition by serving up a spicy Caribbean-themed menu for food snob Jeanette and her husband Rob, and lovebirds Tim and Kath. However, spice-loving Carla causes upset by revealing she plans on bringing her own hot pepper sauce to the other couples dinner parties

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: Its hammer time in the third series where the property brothers work more makeover magic. Will helping their homeowners be as tough as nails or as easy as flipping a switch? With a baby on the way, Daniel and Vanessa have just two months to find a larger home. They get their hands dirty as they help to transform their lacklustre home into a sale-ready house. As eyes turn to a new place, can Drew balance finding glitz and glam and a macho man cave? Short:Daniel and Vanessa get hands-on as they transform their lacklustre home into a sale-ready house. But can Drew balance glitz and glam with a macho man cave?

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Bride-to-be Anna has always dreamed of getting married in the family church in Norfolk, but her fiance Lee decides to plan a Vegas-themed wedding

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Yorkshire groom Lee is tasked with planning a surprise wedding for bride-to-be Rebecca, but instead goes on a week-long trip around Europe with his brother Shane and his friends

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Steven Newman, CEO of department store chain Loehmanns, views his company from a different perspective when he goes undercover as an aspiring entrepreneur visiting the shops after winning a reality TV contest. And thats when he learns first-hand that the employees are the foundation of the company

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Jane Grote Abell, the Chairwoman of Donatos Pizza and daughter of the companys founder, poses as a contestant on a reality TV show who is trying to win money to open her own restaurant. Her aim is to uncover where the company is going, what plans for the future should include and whether her fathers values are still being upheld

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits Meson de Mesilla, a Tuscan-style hotel in Las Cruces, New Mexico. Owner and former child-star Cali Szczawinski purchased the hotel so she could perform Cher songs every night to a captive audience, but Gordon investigates whether she may be falling flat when it comes to the needs of her guests because shes too busy trying to hit the high notes on stage

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in at the 90-year-old Monticello Hotel in Longview, Washington, where owner Phillip Lovingfoss has an apparent liking for alcohol that some of his staff claim is threatening to destroy the business. The challenge of turning around the hotels fortunes only increases when the chef sees shocking allegations about Phillip splashed all over the front page of the local newspaper

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: Its hammer time in the third series where the property brothers work their makeover magic. Will helping these homeowners be as tough as nails or as easy as flipping a switch? Jonie was delighted when her eldest daughter Taisha moved back in. But now theres a struggle for space. Jonathan and Drew find a solution, but it means mother and daughter must step out of their comfort zone. Short:Jonie was delighted when her daughter Taisha moved back in. But now theres a struggle for space. To sell their home, Jonathan and Drew must make it look brand new

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.desc: Dr Tiffany Moon and her husband Daniel step aboard with their friends, hoping for a five-star experience. Danni and Keith struggle to get in sync, so Danni has a splashy rendezvous with another crew member

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies delivers angry appraisals from his comfy throne, as Ed Gamble dons a babys bonnet, Katy Wix makes Alex Horne wince and Rose Matafeo does a spot of screaming

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, as Sean Lock and Richard Ayoade take on Jon Richardson and Jessica Knappett. Alex Horne and the Horne Section join wordsmith Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while maths whizz Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Adam and Jonny arrive at Mum and Dads house with big news to announce - they both have girlfriends. Dad buys a caravan that has seen better days and is keen for the family to have dinner in there. However, Mum refuses to step foot inside, though Jim is less fussy as his house has flooded. Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Tamsin Greig and Paul Ritter star in Robert Poppers award-winning comedy

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Martins questionable behaviour shows no signs of stopping as he becomes obsessed with a plastic bag thats stuck up a tree. The only thing more ridiculous than Dads quest is Jonnys new silver coat, which makes him look like an astronaut on his next mission to Jupiter. Meanwhile, Adam offends his mother by failing to mention her in an interview about his music with a local magazine - despite giving Dad, Jonny and even Aunty Val a namecheck. Comedy, starring Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Tamsin Greig and Paul Ritter

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers
programme.desc: The pop-up parlour gets a visit from drag queen Devon, who feels snared by his barbed-wire tattoo as it is a painful reminder of an ex. Alice welcomes Halloween-loving Chippy, who has a spooky portrait of her daughter, Jay tackles an all-you-can-eat buffet tattoo, and Sketch helps Aidan, whose dislike of five pence shopping bags caused him to get carried away with his ink

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies delivers angry appraisals from his comfy throne, as Ed Gamble dons a babys bonnet, Katy Wix makes Alex Horne wince and Rose Matafeo does a spot of screaming

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
